form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th over 400m at Geelong beaten 4.5 lengths (23.02) behind Like Dynamite in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 14. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but failed to deliver, finishing finished 4th in a T3 RSTW on April 13 over 390m at Ballarat behind Rumbling Rose beaten 2 lengths (22.63). Placed two back at this track. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (24.39) over 425m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw but is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished eighth over 390m at Shepparton, beaten 7 lengths. Likely to struggle this time.
